title: Ravenhead 0041.625 Entertain Set of 2 Highly Transparent 29.5 cl Margarita Glasses
features: Set of 2 elegant 29.5 cl margarita glasses crafted from high quality glass
Slender yet sturdy stem with distinctive bowl that enhances flavours and aromas
Perfect for serving a variety of cocktails, including the traditional margarita
Sophisticated glassware - perfect for both casual and fine dining
Ravenhead highly transparent durable glassware - dishwasher safe
description: From the manufacturer Ravenhead has been a trusted British brand since 1842, and is renowned for quality glassware. Margarita The classic Entertain Margarita glasses are perfect for serving a variety of cocktails, including the traditional margarita and frozen cocktails. Martini The Ravenhead martini glasses are made with you and your lifestyle in mind - create a modern look, enjoy the atmosphere and entertain in style. Cocktail Saucer Ravenhead entertain set of 4 cocktail saucers comes in a beautiful giftbox making it an ideal gift as well as a lovely treat for yourself. Tall Cocktail These tall cocktail glasses are durable and highly transparent making them suitable for everyday use and all occasions - make yourself the perfect pina colada in style.
